description_long: This object is a long, slender knife or sword with a straight, narrow blade and a distinct handle. The blade is black with a crisscross pattern running along its length, giving it a modern or stylized appearance. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped or textured in a bright yellow-green color, and appears to provide a secure grip. There is a small, thin guard separating the blade from the handle, offering minimal protection. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation or embellishments. The proportions suggest it is lightweight and intended for precise cutting or thrusting.
description: A straight, black-bladed knife or sword with a yellow-green textured handle and a minimal guard. The design is modern, sleek, and functional.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade with a crisscross pattern and the yellow-green handle.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, highlighting its cylindrical shape and textured yellow-green surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the blade's length and handle, with the crisscross pattern visible.
description_view_3: Blade tip view, emphasizing the thinness of the blade and the rounded end of the handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, yellow-green, textured or wrapped for grip
